series_metadata.series_description: These files contain reports for each savings bank regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions ("DFI") under Chapters 1161., 1163. and 1165. of the Ohio Revised Code. These records also contain related examination report correspondence regarding directives issued by the DFI.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm for twenty (20) years after date of the examination report, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years after date of the examination report, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
